zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Darcy於大約1379年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Philip Darcy28歲，母親Elizabeth Grey25歲。她和John Rochfort至少有3個女兒。她去世於1431年之前在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Darcy于大约1379年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Philip Darcy28岁，母亲Elizabeth Grey25岁。她和John Rochfort至少有3个女儿。她去世于1431年之前在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Darcy was born about 1379, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Philip Darcy, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Grey, was 25. She had at least 3 daughters with John Rochfort. She died before 1431, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Darcy est née environ 1379, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip Darcy, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Grey, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec John Rochfort. Elle est décédée avant 1431, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Darcy um 1379 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip Darcy 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Grey 25. Sie hatte mit John Rochfort mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1431 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Darcy è nata il circa 1379 nel Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Philip Darcy, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Grey, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con John Rochfort. Morì prima del 1431, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Darcyが約1379年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Philip Darcyは28歳，母Elizabeth Greyは25歳であった。彼女はJohn Rochfortとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1431年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Darcy(이)가 대략 1379년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip Darcy(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Grey(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 John Rochfort(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1431년 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Darcy nasceu aproximadamente 1379, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Darcy, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Grey, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com John Rochfort. Ela faleceu antes 1431, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Darcy родилась около 1379 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip Darcy было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Grey, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от John Rochfort. Она умерла перед 1431 г. в её родном городе.
